name: Employee Retention Credit (ERC)

eligibility.description: Available to employers whose operations were fully/partially suspended by government order or who saw gross receipts drop below 80% of the same 2019 quarter. Includes special provisions for 'recovery startup businesses' and 'severely financially distressed employers'.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a refundable tax credit equal to 70% of qualified wages (up to $10,000 per employee per quarter) for eligible employers affected by COVID-19 closures or significant gross receipts declines.
